MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-21-2021 Vacated

Off Calendar May-13-2020 Set For Trial On Jun-14-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2020 Continued To May-27-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Pankit Doshi, Esq. 628-218-3818 of McDermott Will & Emery for Plaintiff.
Stephen Tedesco, Esq. 415-433-1940 of Littler Mendelson PC for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. 9:30 am. The Court hands out copies of its tentative ruling. 9:47 am the matter is recalled. Hearing is held. Defendant argues. Plaintiff responds. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF KENNETH GOULD's Motion For Preliminary Injunction.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Granted. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order granting preliminary Injunction/Preliminary Injunction is signed. (see scanned order/preliminary injunction for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
